title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper argues that AGI may not be the endpoint but the starting point for artificial superintelligence. The paper suggests that once human-level AI is achieved, it can be copied, accelerated, and networked into agent teams to build better AI, making the post-AGI transition potentially more consequential than AGI itself.
writeup: The video examines Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper, which frames AGI not as a destination but as a launch point toward artificial superintelligence. The central argument: once human-level AI exists, it can be copied, accelerated, and networked into agent teams that build better AI, making the post-AGI transition potentially more consequential than reaching AGI in the first place. Supporting concepts include AI agents, test-time compute, and the scaling of AI systems.
